narrative:
Etna Township D (precinct in Licking County) has 1,946 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.7 percentage points.
